svg.text: Conv_Simple / CV-101 (garage conveyor) — Allen-Bradley Micro820 2080-LC20-20QBB embedded DI (24 VDC)
CCW_VARIABLES v4.0 labels I-05 'Entry sensor (spare)' — superseded by live Prog_init

• I-02/I-03 are MONITORED e-stop inputs only — a monitored input is NOT a safety stop. A compliant install must hardwire S0 to remove drive power (NFPA 79 / EN 60204-1, stop cat 0/1) (style law §7; docs/references/industrial-wiring-diagram-standards.md).

• READS (acceptance): +24 VDC starts at PS1 (E-004) → device contact shown → proposed wire # → PLC terminal I-0x → function/OPC tag → returns via COM0 → 0V (E-004). Verified vs field-verify marked per conductor.
• VERIFIED (solid) = PLC terminal + function traced to the running program / Ignition OPC docs; FIELD VERIFY (dashed) = physical wiring not documented — meter it (see E-009 open items).
• COM0 input common — sink/source jumpering FIELD VERIFY (OI-02).
